--- title: "Environment Setup Check" format: html jupyter: python3 --- ## ライブラリのインポートと版数確認 ::: {#963ff2ae .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import sys import polars as pl import pandas as pd import numpy as np import torch print(f"Python: {sys.version.split()[0]}") print(f"polars: {pl.__version__}") print(f"pandas: {pd.__version__}") print(f"numpy: {np.__version__}") print(f"torch: {torch.__version__}") print(f"CUDA: {torch.cuda.is_available()}") print(f"MPS: {torch.backends.mps.is_available()}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Python: 3.11.14 polars: 1.40.0 pandas: 3.0.2 numpy: 2.4.4 torch: 2.11.0 CUDA: False MPS: True ``` ::: ::: ## DataFrame表示の確認 (Data Explorerで開けるか) ::: {#349e6ae5 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} df = pl.DataFrame({ "user_id": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], "question_id": [101, 102, 101, 103, 102], "correct": [1, 0, 1, 1, 0], "elapsed_ms": [1200, 3400, 900, 5600, 2100], }) df ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
